title: Enhanced Totems
description: A vanilla+ data pack that adds different variations of totems.
body:
Enhanced Totems is a vanilla+ data pack that adds variations of the basic totem of undying. The custom totems of undying work by giving a small bonus when held in the offhand. 

Totems include the Fierce Totem which gives +1 Attack Damage, or the Blessed Totem, which gives +1 Heart. These variations of totems make the game just a little better, without overhauling anything major. 

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u2sDtp7n/images/6f8eb2b912b91ca79fc39f51c21d31ac34c5f186.png)
